steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence sets up a parallel comparison using "whereas": the combtooth blenny's highest count was 62 individuals in January 2001, so the blank must supply the yellowtail sergeant's actual highest count in the same format — a number and a month taken directly from the graph.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 72 individuals in January of 2001.: The yellowtail sergeant never reaches 72 individuals on the graph. ✗
  • Choice B — 15 individuals in April of 2001.: The graph does not show the yellowtail sergeant peaking at 15 individuals in April. ✗
  • Choice C — 13 individuals in January of 2001.: The yellowtail sergeant's January count is lower than 13 individuals. ✗
  • Choice D — 3 individuals in January of 2001.: The graph shows the yellowtail sergeant's peak at approximately 3 individuals in January 2001 — the correct count at the correct month. This completes the parallel structure and preserves the contrast (62 vs. 3). ✓
That is the correct answer.
